text.title: Prompt Techniques — Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure for replacing an underperforming PromptLibrary entry with a measured improvement.

step.name: baseline
step.action: Run the entry against the golden set; record eval_score and per-case failures.

step.name: generate-candidate
step.action: Either manual rewrite (low ambiguity) or meta-prompting via opus (cross-failure synthesis). Add explicit handling for known failure cases.

step.name: human-review
step.action: Named engineer reviews; checks for injection vectors, model-specific phrasing, accidental constraint loss.
step.decision-gate: If candidate is meta-generated, this step is mandatory.

step.name: ab-test
step.action: Run A/B harness on the target model; compute per-case lift; identify regressions.
step.decision-gate: If any per-case regression > 5% AND not offset by overall lift > 10%, reject candidate.

step.name: commit
step.action: Bump version in PromptLibrary YAML; attach ab_record_id; commit.

step.name: snapshot
step.action: Run snapshot tests against pinned model; commit snapshot fixtures.

step.name: monitor
step.action: Track production accuracy on a sampled production tap; alert if it drops > 5% from eval_score for > 24h.
